prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约9699名→10083名→10340名→10538名→12291名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近两年后移幅度明显加大，2025 年较2024年后移约1753名，基准位次约12291名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021年1131人、2022年1143人、2023年1175人、2024年1330人、2025年1708人， 持续扩招；2026年计划1856人，较2025年增加148人，扩招约8.7%，扩招使竞争略有加剧（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海大学为211工程、双一流高校；软科 中国大学排名近年分别为2021年第43名、2022年第46名、2023年第48名、2024年第56名、2025年第61名、2026年第60名，整体排名在50–60区间波动，2026年略有回升；2026年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据造假、院长被免职等），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生抑制；抖音热度排名第48位（较热），短视频平 台关注度中等偏上；近年无投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估中社会学获评A、世界史获评A-，均为人文社科类优势学科，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 上海大学位于上海市，为本省唯一市属211高校，本地招生占比极高（2025年计划1708人占全市考生约3.5%），本省考生报考意愿 强烈，地域偏好稳定；2026年上海市普通高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+8.7%）、上海市考生总数大幅增长（+35%）、声誉负面信号等因素：考生规模 激增是推动位次后移的最主要力量，扩招部分缓解但不足以抵消竞争加剧；声誉负面可能使部分考生转向其他院校，产生微弱抵消作用。预测2026年最低录取位次约13000名，区 间12500–13500名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约13000名，区间12500–13500名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主攻方向（微电子、人工智能、数学、通信、智能制造等），一档（钱伟长学院、未来技术学院、计算机 ）作为冲刺，三档（电气类、材料类、经济管理类、人文类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<12500名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>13500名）建议 以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 9699 → 10083 → 10340 → 10538 → 12291, showing a continuous backward trend with a significant acceleration in the last two years. In 2025, the ranking moved back by about 1753 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 12291. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shanghai was 1131 in 2021, 1143 in 2022, 1175 in 2023, 1330 in 2024, and 1708 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 1856, an increase of 148 from 2025, an expansion of about 8.7%, which slightly intensifies competition (ranking numbers increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its recent rankings in the Soft Science China University Rankings are: 43rd in 2021, 46th in 2022, 48th in 2023, 56th in 2024, 61st in 2025, and 60th in 2026, fluctuating within the 50–60 range, with a slight recovery in 2026. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 48th (relatively hot), with above-average attention on short video platforms. There have been no recent records of admission cutoff line drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, sociology received an A rating and world history received an A-, both advantageous disciplines in humanities and social sciences, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, the only municipal-level Project 211 university in the province, with a very high proportion of local enrollment (the 2025 plan of 1708 accounts for about 3.5% of the city's examinees). Local candidates have a strong willingness to apply, and regional preference is stable. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025, representing a significant growth in the candidate pool and a notable factor intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+8.7%), the substantial increase in the number of candidates in Shanghai (+35%), and negative reputation signals: the surge in candidate numbers is the primary force driving the ranking backward; the expansion partially alleviates but is insufficient to offset the intensified competition; the negative reputation may cause some candidates to turn to other institutions, producing a slight offsetting effect. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 13,000, with a range of 12,500–13,500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 13,000, with a range of 12,500–13,500. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Microelectronics, Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics, Communication, Intelligent Manufacturing, etc.), use Tier 1 (Qian Weichang College, Future Technology College, Computer Science) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Electrical, Materials, Economics and Management, Humanities) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<12,500), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is near the upper bound (>13,500), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 with Tier 2 as supplementary.
